name: Conekta
description: Conekta — Mexico payment gateway supporting cards, OXXO cash, SPEI bank transfers, and recurring billing for online merchants.

seo.title: Conekta — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Conekta: Conekta — Mexico payment gateway supporting cards, OXXO cash, SPEI bank transfers, and recurring billing for online merchants.

when_to_use: Card, OXXO cash, and SPEI bank transfer acceptance for Mexican merchants
Recurring billing via card or SPEI for subscription services in Mexico
Embedded checkout widget for Mexican e-commerce platforms
Payment link generation for invoice-based businesses in Mexico

review.verdict: One of the better Mexican payment APIs for developers, especially if you need OXXO and SPEI alongside cards.
review.best_for: Online merchants in Mexico needing cards, OXXO, and SPEI in one API
review.not_for: Businesses outside Mexico or wanting full LatAm coverage
